title: ficus microcarpa var. naumannii
intro: Ficus microcarpa var. naumannii, commonly known as the 'Tiger Bark' or 'Banyan Fig', is a variety of the Ficus microcarpa species, a type of evergreen tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The medicinal properties of Ficus microcarpa var. naumannii include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antibacterial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to improve cardiovascular health, reduce the risk of cancer, and support immune function. In traditional Chinese medicine, Ficus microcarpa var. naumannii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, to promote overall well-being and longevity.
